overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a covered urban walkway, passing through a green-lit tunnel, crossing neon-lit streets, and ascending to an elevated walkway overlooking a dense futuristic skyline with towering holographic billboards. The scene features persistent rain, fog, and reflective wet surfaces throughout.

extensive metal scaffolding along the right wall of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Metal scaffolding lines the right side while a food stall with a red canopy glows warmly on the right. The wet pavement reflects distant neon lights through the foggy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian underpass with green fluorescent lighting

approaching tunnel exit, red neon light from pedestrian umbrella becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow underpass with green fluorescent lighting

rows of green fluorescent tube lights illuminating tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, enclosed tunnel with industrial corrugated metal walls illuminated by eerie green fluorescent lights. Digital advertisements line the walls as the camera moves forward, approaching the tunnel exit where a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with neon storefronts and billboards

events.description: exiting tunnel into open street with bright neon signage and wet asphalt
approaching and beginning to ascend concrete stairs to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: crossing open street and approaching stairs to elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella ascending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: open intersection with wet asphalt road surface
tall buildings covered with bright neon advertisements and signage
ground level shops with illuminated awnings and signage
concrete staircase entrance leading to elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into an open urban intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in vibrant neon billboards. The camera crosses the wet asphalt street, passing storefronts with glowing signs, and approaches a concrete staircase leading upward while following a pedestrian with an umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking dense neon cityscape

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to elevated walkway level
reaching top of stairs, panoramic view of dense neon skyline revealed

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking the sprawling neon city below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking ahead on the elevated platform

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian platform with metal railings overlooking the city
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with massive holographic displays
large suspended digital billboards with animated neon advertisements
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the skyline

segments.scene_description: Ascending the stairs to an elevated pedestrian walkway that opens onto a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk cityscape. The walkway features metal railings and overlooks dense traffic below, while massive floating holographic billboards and towering neon skyscrapers dominate the skyline in every direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban underpass into a vast, neon-drenched cyberpunk skyline. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass in a covered walkway, passing a warm red food stall and metal scaffolding while rain-slicked pavement reflects the foggy night. The camera then transitions into a narrow, enclosed tunnel of corrugated metal illuminated by eerie green fluorescent lights and digital ads, moving forward toward a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella. As the camera exits the tunnel, the environment opens into a vibrant urban intersection where the view expands to towering buildings and glowing storefronts before turning toward a concrete staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs to an elevated walkway, revealing a breathtaking panoramic vista of dense traffic and massive floating holographic billboards that dominate the futuristic horizon.
